description: This lamp is guaranteed to grab guests' attention, but if you're new to smart home tech, you may prefer to skip the app and use its remote control instead.

description: This corded vacuum cleaner is very reasonably priced, and punches well above its weight despite a few quirks.

description: A compact travel shaver with great battery life that performs as advertised — though a trimmer attachment would've been nice for beard-havers.

title: The new Romo P robovac from drone expert DJI has the most jaw-dropping obstacle avoidance I’ve ever seen
